Video.summary: ōThe Century Raceö: Dale believes he found the bike that will help him beat a rival in an annual race of 100 year old motorcycles. But will it run?
Video.title: The Century Race

Video.summary: A California collector gambles on a big payday from his Crocker/Caddy combo.
Video.title: Doubling Down

Video.summary: For Dale and Matt sometimes the dotted line to treasure splits and heads in opposite directions. In this edition of WhatÆs in the Barn, time is thrust to the forefront of this multi-state, long distance, north, south search. Timeless and priceless 110 year old bikes, antique cars, airplanes, and the infamous Egberts 1930 neon Harley-Davidson sign that coined the phrase ōRide a Winnerö are high on this father and sonÆs list of ōmust havesö. The clock ticks, both literally and figuratively, on one rare time piece and two old-timerÆs cars, bikes, and automobiles.
Video.title: Time is Not On Their Side

Image.alt: Time is Not On Their Side
Time is Not On Their Side
Time is Not On Their Side

Video.summary: Promoters of the prestigious Amelia Island Concours have called on Dale to develop a show and field bikes for an ōOrphan Bikeö show. They have defined orphan bike as extremely rare, that aren't a Harley nor Indian machines.
Video.title: Orphan Bikes

Video.summary: ōA Motorcycle Crime Storyö: The horrific tale of a double murder over money and motorcycles.
Video.title: Motorcycle Crime Story

Video.summary: ōYes, Dale there is a 100 Year Old Harleyö: Dale hopes his labor of love becomes a prized possession when a six-figure Harley goes to auction.
Video.title: 100 Year Old Harley

Video.summary: A thousand bulging barns of choppers, bobbers, and board trackers are emptied and on display in the Quad Cities.
Video.title: Davenport Swap

Video.summary: A vague tip leads Matt and Dale into a WWII era military warehouse and beyond.
Video.title: Peashooter

Video.summary: A cross-country race to lay claim to some of the worldÆs most sought after works specials.
Video.title: Hidden Hillclimbers

Video.summary: ō12hrs. & Runningö: Dale turns a surprise 60th birthday party into a challenge to his guests to start 120 of the rarest motorcycles in the world.
Video.title: 12 Hours and Running

Video.summary: The word is out that Caffeine & Octane is the ultimate scene and the place to be seen. Even after 12 hours of racing at the Petit Le Mans endurance race, Henry Ford III, the great grandson of Henry Ford the industrial magnate and current member of FordÆs Board of Directors, showed up to take in the sights, address the crowds, and sign a one of a kind Ford Shelby GT350R. The GT350R will hit the road with Operation Hope to encourage young people to study math and science through motorsports; Covert car counterfeiter, Chuck Beck looks for FordÆs approval on his own version of a muscled up Festiva. YouTuber æThat Dude in BlueÆ David Patterson joins Skip and Bryan to get a special look at the motor-based philanthropic outreach and amazing cars that come with it done by John Hope Bryant, friend of Caffeine and Octane.
Video.title: Henry Ford III & Counterfeit Cars

Video.summary: Rickey and Bryan race outside of their comfort zones, each competing to find the raddest car collection. Rickey hangs out with classic racer, Ron Green, who shows him the ropes in the ultra light '83 Ralt RT5. Bryan visits a collection of 120 racing motorcycle owned by mechanic and racer Mike McConville. Mike takes Bryan motorcross racing in his backyard after showing off his high horsepowered car collection. Caffeine and Octane alongside Ron Green visit Atlanta's first Concours d'elegance to look at classic cars that have been perfectly maintained for decades.
Video.title: Go Fast Collections

Video.summary: Wayne PhearsÆ Jaguar E-Type was nothing more than a diamond in the rough before the mineral rights attorney took on the basket case. Caffeine & Octane brings viewers the story of how PhearsÆ, through relentless research and determination, restored and reunited the #10 Jag that Enzo Ferrari called ōthe most beautiful car ever madeö; Atlanta Wraps shows how wrapping Corvettes and Lamborghinis can color a car fast. Caffeine and Exotics is featured again to show off the coolest wraps Atlanta can supply.
Video.title: The Wrap on the Most Beautiful Cars

Image.alt: The Wrap on the Most Beautiful Cars
The Wrap on the Most Beautiful Cars
The Wrap on the Most Beautiful Cars

Video.summary: Twenty-five years of hand building record-setting race cars is no easy task. But donÆt tell that to Don Panoz who takes on Porsches and Ferraris with his laid back personality and a full-production facility that makes improvised versions of Americas V-8Æs; Caffeine & Octane gets an exclusive look at an elusive manÆs life long pursuit of everything Chevrolet.
Video.title: Panoz Racing & Chasing Chevys

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane goes old school with Psycho Deville singer and pin striper Walt Richards. Richards has less than a week to hand paint his signature flames on a way cool Æ50 Mercury. An introduction to Retrofit LightingÆs trickle down technology - from cars to motorcycles - that will revolutionize how bikes will see and be seen.
Video.title: Retrofitting a Psycho Mercury

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane is known for having something for everyone. That reputation is tested when over 100 VWÆs, on the lunatic fringe of automotive, rattled into an event. The annual VW Invasion has swarmed C&O, bringing with it Bugs, Beetles, Buses and more by a very dedicated VW fan base.
Video.title: Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!

Image.alt: Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!
Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!
Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!

Video.summary: Rapper, radio, and ATL TV personality Darian ōBig Tiggerö Morgan invites Caffeine & Octane into his home. Cameras look past his collection of 500 Michael Jordan shoes to focus their lenses on a one-off motorcycle the 6¢time NBA Champion gave to Tigger as a gift; A second to none, muscle car collection by one of the founders of Monster Energy gets toured by one of our hosts.
Video.title: Big Tigger v. Monster Muscle

Video.summary: Vintage Testarossas and Quatra Valve Ferraris donÆt just show up on a dealerÆs floor, theyÆre hunted! Adam Merlin, exotic car expert, has spent a lifetime searching for the cars that defined his youth, but nothing is assumed or given in his high stakes game of Risk; A muscle car fiend shows off his private collection to host Skip Smith.
Video.title: Exotic Car Hunter

Video.summary: The word is out that Caffeine & Octane is the major league of North American car shows. Former Atlanta Brave, World Series star, and 10-Time Gold Glove winner Andruw Jones acknowledged the stardom and showed up to show off his 6 wheeled Super Jeep. The state of the art creation took years in planning and execution, but Jones chooses one great event for its debut.
Video.title: Andruw Jones' Super Jeep

Video.summary: The natural landscape of Jekyll Island, GA makes for a great backdrop to showcase the countryÆs greatest cars. But the ocean air and remoteness of this GA barrier island is no place to leave a painstakingly rebuilt æ59 Imperial Speedster. Host Skip Smith makes it his mission to locate the talented builder behind this island mystery. Guest host Totem joins Bryan Fuller in the C&O lots to pick out his favorites.
Video.title: Jekyll and Hide

Video.summary: Imagination, ingenuity, and heartache join friends who set out with a simple goal of transforming a æ35 Plymouth into a running taxi cab. Provenance and passion take center stage as families and friends strive for best in show. Host Rickey Gadson checks out perfect replicas of the original Shelby Cobras and takes Skip and Bryan on æborrowedÆ taxi ride.
Video.title: Big Yellow Taxi

Video.summary: Call the Peach State Challengers a ōcar clubö and you will quickly be corrected. The defenders of everything Dodge are ōfamilyö and they make no excuses for their loyalty to brand and brother. Spend a day at the track with these Challengers and find out what their version of the family photo looks like.
Video.title: Peach State Challengers

Video.summary: Former Jet Ski Champion Ryan Hardwick has succeeded in everything heÆs touched in racing and business, so why not race Lamborghinis! Hardwick has found rapid success with his high tech training methods; he shares his secrets with host Rickey Gadson in this episode of C&O.
Video.title: Lambo Racer

Video.summary: Daimlers and Morgans, and Citroens, oh my! Caffeine & Octane is known for having something for everyone. That reputation grows stronger as Bob BostonÆs collection, on the lunatic fringe of automotive, rattles into an event; guest host Katherine Legge explains the competitor to her racing sponsor Acura, Porsche.
Video.title: Boston's (Un)Common Collection

Video.summary: Early spring in Jekyll Island, GA is something to behold. Add a few hundred of the countryÆs coolest rides for Caffeine & Octane at the Beach, and itÆs a thing of beauty. Models that blasted the glass ceiling of expectation at the all makes and models show include a hand-built, twin-turbo Tucker, a one-off 1951 Kaiser DragÆN, and a Roadkill Custom known only as Blasphemi!
Video.title: C&O at the Beach

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane is back at the beach on Jekyll Island with a focus on cars and families. Fathers & sons, with their barn-find Pilot House trucks and Plymouth Satellites, call cars the glue that keeps them bonded together with C&O being the best place to show them off.
Video.title: Kenny Rogers' Family Values

Video.summary: Nick Rutter shows you how to remove bugs, polish exhaust tips and safetly remove dust
Video.title: Dust, Bugs and More

Video.summary: Nick Rutter shows you the process of applying a coating from claying, polishing, and maintenance
Video.title: Coating Your Car

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno completely overhaul the interior of a C20. Changing out the seats, dash accessories and door panels. WeÆre going from Clean to Custom on Truck U.
Video.title: Clean to Custom

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno show you how to personalize your Jeep with some paint and fabrication.
Video.title: Color Match

Video.summary: ItÆs a fishing day on Truck U. Matt and Bruno take two trucks and get them ready to tow with a turbo rebuild and some towing accessories.
Video.title: Fishing Trucks

Video.summary: To sell this Longbed C-10, Matt and Bruno need to get it back to stock. They transform the interior back to a factory style bench seat. The exhaust also gets a factory style upgrade.
Video.title: Back to stock

Video.summary: Patina C-10 trucks are all the rage. Matt and Bruno leave the paint alone on a 69Æ C10 project and give it the fine details it needs to look like a finished look.
Video.title: Patina Shortbed

Video.summary: ItÆs back, the new Ford Raptor is here and Matt and Bruno can already make it faster and sound better with aftermarket parts.
Video.title: Revived Raptor

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno find a lowrider truck that has some handling problems. So they fabrication some suspension components and do some interior work.
Video.title: Day in the Dirt

Video.summary: Line æem up. ItÆs a Chevy day on Truck U as Bruno and Matt look at a couple of bowtie trucks in the shop. They do everything from styling upgrades to common problem fixes, and as always, they give you some life lessons along the way.
Video.title: Chevy Day

Video.summary: Ray uncovers the secrets of AmericaÆs greatest racing sport in the foothills of North Carolina. When moonshiners were looking to outrun police officers, they would custom fit engines to race the back woods tracks. That sport eventually evolved into NASCAR and Ray talks to the early adopters of this national pastime.
Video.title: MOONSHINE

Video.summary: Grammy-winning musician Marty Robbins lived a double life, flawlessly crossing between the glitz of the Grand Ole Opry and track at Talladega. One of few musicians to ever achieve success in both genres, Ray is determined to return MartyÆs iconic 777 car to the race track travel back to the 60Æs and 70Æs.
Video.title: MARTY ROBBINS

Video.summary: Legendary drag racer Don ōThe Snakeö Prudhomme proves he is no stranger to the thrill of racing rivalry. PrudhommeÆs career and subsequent competition with driver Tom ōThe Mongooseö McEwan earned the pair an unforgettable imprint on American pop culture. Legions of kids in the 60Æs and 70Æs flocked to the shelves for Snake and Mongoose Matchbox cars which helped make drag racing an undisputable American pastime. Famed director Ron Howard makes an appearance to discuss the incredible stories hidden within the world of Formula 1 Racing, the topic of his latest, epic feature æRushö.
Video.title: HOT RODS

Video.summary: Ray finds Buried Treasures in the form of two race cars that had been left almost completely untouched since the last time they were on a race track. One is found sitting in a barn with the other trapped in an old car hauler. Upon uncovering the cars, we find both have big stories to tell.
Video.title: BURIED TREASURE

Video.summary: A journey to Indianapolis unveils the winning car of the 1955 Indy 500 sits on the roof of an auto mechanic shop. More than 50 years after itÆs magic at the track, prominent Indy mechanic/owner Chris Paulsen begins to restore the car and Ray talks about the evolution of AmericaÆs illustrious Indy 500.
Video.title: INDY RESCUE

Video.summary: In the 1960s, Smokey Yunick, the most innovative mechanic in NASCAR history, sold his famous truck that hauled equipment & cars across the country. Ray is on a mission to uncover this storied truck that helped launch the beginning of NASCARÆs cross-country popularity.
Video.title: SMOKEY

Video.summary: Ray travels to Long Island, New York with the hopes of learning more about AmericaÆs first major auto racing competition. The race, which began at the turn of the 20th century, helped develop the first major American racing stars and drove American manufacturing to competitive standard with the highly progressive Europeans.
Video.title: VANDERBILT

Video.summary: Fred Dmuchowski is a New Jersey racing icon. He was a regular workingman who raced on weekends for fun and became a legend in his iconic 303 racer. Ray works to rebuild the 303 in homage to Fred who inspired him to pursue his career in motorsports.
Video.title: RAYS ROOTS

Video.summary: For Rick Hendrick, the Corvette inspired his first car purchase, which ultimately led to the creation of his car dealership empire and motorsports teams. Mr. H, as he goes by, gives us a rare look inside of his personal Corvette collection and takes us to General Motors World Headquarters to talk with GM Vice President of Global Design, Ed Welburn, about how this iconic car came about. Country superstar Brad Paisley makes a cameo appearance to talk about his prized æVette and the influence of cars on his music.
Video.title: THE CORVETTE

Video.summary: The last car Elvis drove the evening he passed was his beloved Stutz Blackhawk. Ray discovers that the car has been preserved and heads to Graceland to check out this iconic piece of American music history. Ray and the team reveal the impeccable preservation of the car at Charlotte Motor Speedway with Rick Hendrick (ōMr. Hö) and, arguably Elvis PresleyÆs biggest fan, Dale Earnhardt Jr. While at Graceland, Ray and the team also get an exclusive look at the paneled station wagon Elvis used to get in and out of Graceland in disguise. ItÆs an intimate look at the KingÆs incredible automobiles and their secrets that only Elvis knew.
Video.title: ELVIS VAULT

Video.summary: This episode takes an inside look at the famous racing L88 Corvette. From its history, to its successes and heartbreaks, to the stories of the men that drove it. Now, itÆs a car worldÆs version of the Flinstones meet the Jetsons, as the Owens Corning Corvette, which clinched 22 straight race victories, challenges the new Corvette C7-R at Sebring International Raceway. The original Owens Corning team reunites for the challenge and our crew goes behind the scenes for the Corvette test drive of a lifetime.
Video.title: BAND OF BROTHERS

Video.summary: From break up to make up, Jeff Gordon and Ray reunite to go on a quest to find their Chevrolet Monte Carlo that claimed victory in their final race together at Phoenix, AZ in 1999. John Bickford, Jeff GordonÆs stepdad, makes the call that reunites the old team. Jeff and Ray look to bum parts off their boss, Rick Hendrick, to make their vision a reality: get the car, replace the parts as they were, make it run and get it to auction.
Video.title: BREAK UP TO MAKEUP
